title: Azalea PVP
description: Texture Pack made for Bedwars PVP that is pink and green themed
body:
This is a Bedwars 1.8.9 texture pack that I made for my own use.

Some highlights of this pack include:

- Low fire
- Sky overlay
- Heart crosshair
- New particles (crit and potion)
- New font
- Small swords
- Smooth blocks

If skybox doesn't work, relaunch minecraft
